title: DeepSeek-Coder Training Notebook Creation
summary: User asked for ready-made training code from GitHub. Fetched Unsloth Llama3.1 Alpaca notebook, adapted it for DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B with mixed data (Quran + Code + Conversation). Created complete notebook at backend/training/deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb.
decisions: LoRA r=16, alpha=16, target: q/k/v/o/gate/up/down projections
Saves LoRA locally + GGUF q4_k_m for Ollama
torchvision fix needed: pip install torchvision==0.25.0 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
next_steps: Run notebook on Colab T4 GPU
Test inference with Arabic + Quran + code questions
